security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data: asset:; media-src 'self' asset:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; font-src 'self' data:

bundle.shortDescription: A digital edition of Brass: Birmingham (fan project).
bundle.longDescription: MYSpolly is an offline, cross-platform digital implementation of the board game Brass: Birmingham, with hot-seat and AI play in English, Russian and Uzbek.
